description: Ponce Financial Group, Inc. operates as the bank holding company for Ponce Bank that provides various banking products and services. It provides various deposits, including demand, NOW/IOLA, money market, individual retirement, and savings accounts; reciprocal deposits; and certificates of deposit to individuals, business entities, and non-profit organizations. The company also offers real estate-secured loans, including one-to-four family investor-owned and owner-occupied residential; multifamily residential; nonresidential property; construction and land; commercial and industrial; and busin
